docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,100.00 FILED BY DABAI, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS MENDOZA, GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABAI, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAY-09-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABAI, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, GUADALUPE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DABAI, STELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,695.00, AT PLAINTIFFS REQUEST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST GUADALUPE MENDOZA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABAI, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF STELLA DABAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIUS REBOLLINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUADALUPE MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT GUADALUPE MENDOZA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $16.25 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT REBOLLINI, JULIUS
